text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for this year's summer camp, which means
long days, hard training, and improvement in
leaps and bounds.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp... Nnngh... We haven't even left yet
and I'm already getting dizzy...
choice_data_list: Are you okay? Do you feel fatigued?
Are you okay? Do you feel fatigued?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, a little... I think I scheduled too many
media appointments. I've been doing like five
shoots a day on the regular.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Every day, I'm surrounded by people. I really
appreciate their support, but everything's been so
non-stop...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh. Is this what it meant?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I saw it through feng shui. A circle of light with a
little spot of darkness inside it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that little spot was a sign that I was about
to get really, really busy. Ahahaha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'd been eager to do media work, but it seems
she bit off more than she could chew. The best
way to reenergize her would be...
choice_data_list:
Let's stay away from the media while we're at
summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Yeah. You're right. That might be a good
idea! I do wanna focus on training. And...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There's something else that's been bothering me...
a lot.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Look, over there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I glance away from the gate to see a familiar
scene unfolding.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Are you really going to quit? I think it's still too
early for you to give up.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I've got it. Why don't you try a little good luck
ritual to lift your spirits? They've been pretty
popular lately.

text_block_list.name: Departing Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...There's no point. In the end, the reason I can't
win is just because I'm not good enough.
Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There are still so many racers like her. Ones who
give up because they're lost, or don't know what
to do.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. I'm going to try reaching out to some
of them at summer training camp. Just watch me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Hey! You three over there! Is there anything
you've been worrying about when it comes to
running?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I can help you right out with a little feng shui! ☆
C'mon, let me know what's been on your mind!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're... Copano Rickey, right? The racer
everyone's been talking about recently? U-um...

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: We're not really into that stuff, thanks. See you.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Acute! Can we talk to you for a minute? We'd
like some advice about our training.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh, of course, dearies. If there's anything at all I
can do for you, just let me know.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, feng shui is really popular right now, but none
of the Umamusume at Tracen are even remotely
interested, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Acute's always surrounded by racers
who want her advice. I hardly ever see her alone.
choice_data_list: Oh, is that what's been bothering you?
Oh, is that what's been bothering you?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I wanna make everyone happy! And the people I want to teach feng shui to the most...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Are the ones trying to overcome whatever
challenge is in front of them. I mean, they've
gotta be doing the most worrying too, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There are just as many students dropping out of
Tracen Academy as ever. And once they're gone,
the light of feng shui can't reach them...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's frustrating... and really sad. I know Acute's
advice must be helpful too, but I just...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Why do you think the other
Umamusume don't believe in feng shui?
choice_data_list: I'm not sure. But there has to be a reason.
I'm not sure. But there has to be a reason.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their clear lack of interest makes me think there's
something going on that we don't know about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If we could just figure out what...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I'm gonna do my best this summer! I'm
gonna do everything I can to get them to believe!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And then, once we get everyone to trust in my
feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We might have to change my own future plans a
little.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We can shift our focus from racing to spreading
feng shui far and wide.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's how much I care about helping others with
feng shui. And that's why...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: This summer, I'm gonna give all I've got!
